title: Baia Mare、Maramureș — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Baia Mare、Maramureșの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Baia MareはMaramureșにある人口123,738の都市です。The gateway to the Maramureș region, known for its traditional wooden churches, mining heritage, and proximity to some of Romania’s most authentic rural landscapes.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
